column1: # Citizen Ledger — CSU extracted figures, FY 2023-24 (year ended June 30, 2024)
# EXTRACTED from the California State University audited systemwide financial
# statements (GAAP/GASB accrual) and the CSU Fact Book, both published on the
# bot-gated calstate.edu site. Dollars are in THOUSANDS, the finest unit the
# audited statements publish — there is NO cent- or dollar-level figure.
# placing the two source PDFs in pipeline/cache/csu/ — see the module docstring):
#   dollars: FY2324 CSU Financial Statements (301pp PDF): systemwide combining
#            statement p.38; per-campus Schedule 8 statements pp.112-295.
#   headcount: CSU Fact Book 2024, "Enrollment by Campus" Fall 2023, p.9.
